mapper.select: SELECT value_json FROM ai_runtime_setting WHERE setting_key = #{settingKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_runtime_setting (setting_key, value_json, updated_by) VALUES (#{settingKey}, #{valueJson}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value_json = VALUES(value_json), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_at = NOW()
